x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: SPM Performance Analytics provides trend data Now Assist uses for predictive portfolio and capacity insights.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Create PA indicators for key SPM metrics (portfolio health, resource utilization, demand backlog). Schedule data collection jobs. Target: 3+ active indicators covering project, portfolio, and demand domains.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_ca03a33acfd903108935fb251d851ccf
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE">
<ai_justification><![CDATA[SPM Performance Analytics provides trend data Now Assist uses for predictive portfolio and capacity insights.]]></ai_justification>
<check_name>SPM Performance Analytics</check_name>
<check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var matched = {};

    function collectMatches(keyword) {
        var gr = new GlideRecord('pa_indicators');
        gr.addQuery('active', true);
        gr.addQuery('name', 'CONTAINS', keyword);
        gr.query();
        while (gr.next()) {
            matched[gr.getUniqueValue()] = true;
        }
    }

    collectMatches('project');
    collectMatches('portfolio');
    collectMatches('demand');

    var count = Object.keys(matched).length;
    var actualValue = count + ' active SPM PA indicators';

    if (count >= 3) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: count + ' active SPM PA indicators — Now Assist SPM can provide trend-based portfolio AI insights.'
        };
    } else if (count >= 1) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + count + ' active SPM PA indicator(s) (target: 3+). Now Assist SPM trend-based insights will be limited — point-in-time analysis only for uncovered metrics.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'No active SPM PA indicators found. Now Assist SPM uses PA trend data for predictive portfolio insights — without PA data AI can only provide point-in-time analysis.'
        };
    }
})]]></check_script>
<is_active>true</is_active>
<is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive>
<is_manual>false</is_manual>
<module>SPM</module>
<number>CHK0006101</number>
<order>100</order>
<remediation_guidance>Create PA indicators for key SPM metrics (portfolio health, resource utilization, demand backlog). Schedule data collection jobs. Target: 3+ active indicators covering project, portfolio, and demand domains.</remediation_guidance>
<sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by>
<sys_created_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_created_on>
<sys_id>ca03a33acfd903108935fb251d851ccf</sys_id>
<sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count>
<sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by>
<sys_updated_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_updated_on>
</x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
